summary: Local models are downloaded on demand into ~/.agent-devkit/models. The bundled catalog lists compatible GGUF models; nothing is downloaded at package install time.
facts: Model artifacts are stored under ~/.agent-devkit/models as <id>.gguf with an <id>.json sidecar.
Downloads are verified against the catalog sha256 when it is present.
The default model id is stored in ~/.agent-devkit/models/default.
